statusLine.command: i=$(cat); d=$(printf "%s" "$i" | jq -r ".workspace.current_dir // .cwd"); b=$(git -C "$d" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); printf "%s" "$i" | jq -r --arg b "$b" '"[\(.model.display_name)] 📁 \(.workspace.current_dir|split("/")|last)" + ($b|if .=="" then "" else " | 🌿 "+. end) + ([(.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty | "5h \(floor)%"), (.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty | "1w \(floor)%")] | if length>0 then " | ⏳ "+join(" · ") else "" end)'
